Faculty of Applied Sciences

Double Major and Minor

Minor Program

MENU

MINOR PROGRAM

Students who are enrolled in any undergraduate degree program of the Faculty of Applied Sciences and meet the admission requirements may pursue a minor program in the undergraduate program they apply to, after the evaluation of the Faculty Administrative Board.

Click to access our university's Double Minor Program directive.

ARTICLE 3 – (1) of our University’s MINOR PROGRAM DIRECTIVE: "The minor program consists of at least 18 credits. The courses and credits that the student must take in the minor program are determined with the approval of the senate upon the recommendation of the relevant departments and faculty boards."

In accordance with this, students of the faculty must successfully complete the courses listed below in order to obtain a minor certificate in the undergraduate program they are enrolled in.

2025 - 2026 Academic Year Faculty of Applied Sciences Minor Curricula
